description: 100V 60A Schottky, IFSM 450A (blocking x2, freewheel x2, bank clamp x1)
32A barrier terminal, coil + aux-bank connections (pulse path)
30A 58VDC MINI blade fuse, aux-bank feed; holder Keystone 3568
Current-mode boost controller, 24.5-55V operating (63V-rated bank) @ ~0.5A, Vcc from +12V rail
12V coil SPDT 15A (charge + dump), NO contact used

Shunt ref +/-0.5%, DBZ pinout (1=K,2=REF,3=A) -- matches the TL431DBZ footprint. OVP trip 60.5V nom (59.1-62.0V band). NOT CJ431/C3113 (that part is 1=REF,2=K,3=A -> OVP dead); NOT the 1% A-grade (would blow the 62.0V ceiling)
24V->12V linear, gate-driver + relay rail. THERMAL FOLLOW-UP: ~0.5-0.85W during charge is hot for SOT-89 -- upgrade to 78M12 TO-252/DPAK (Shikues C116325) in a dedicated re-place/re-route pass
24V input TVS, bidirectional (matches D_TVS symbol); 26V standoff clamps below SMBJ33A -- confirm vs AP63205 VIN abs-max
5A input fuse (holder hand-installed; confirm PN at order)
-40V PFET reverse-polarity protection (confirm stock at order)
Dual 5A low-side gate driver (per-FET gate resistors)
RRIO dual op-amp: V_bank + 24V sense buffers
Quad comparator x2: 6 IR gate channels + live-bank detect
Sensor-rail ribbon headers (2 on driver, 1 per rail)

alternate: RX27-4V 20W from Digi-Key if single-part preferred

description: 6.8k permanent bleed (0.44W cont, 2.2x margin). 1W is the 2512 land rating; 1.5W/2W 2512 are all 0-stock on LCSC
alternate: C340514 (RMC1-682JTE-M) or C42372225, both 6.8k 2512 1W in stock

description: 0.15ohm boost switch current sense (~6.7A limit; was 0.05ohm/20A, above realistic inductor saturation)
100uF 63V boost output x2 (ripple: datasheet check at order)
MINI blade fuse holder (2 clips per fuse position)
Raspberry Pi Pico socket (Pico bought separately)
MCU-agnostic IO breakout (parallel with Pico socket)
